agent_instances_example.purpose: Review generated-agent write-helper gates for bypasses.

work_split.scope: Map relevant files, scripts, tests, and conventions before spec drafting.
work_split.parallel_rationale: Codebase exploration can run beside docs research and risk review when subagent tooling is available.

work_split.scope: Implement the first bounded vadi-owned slice with local sanity checks.
work_split.parallel_rationale: Implementation chunks must be split across both roles when paths are disjoint.

work_split.scope: Implement the first bounded prativadi-owned slice with local sanity checks.
work_split.parallel_rationale: Two-team parallel implementation reduces idle time and gives both roles code ownership before review.

work_split.scope: Create or update tests for every new behavior before cross-review and deep_review.
work_split.parallel_rationale: Test creation follows the concrete implementation surface selected for the phase.

work_split.scope: Each role reviews the other role's implementation chunks before holistic deep_review.
work_split.parallel_rationale: Vadi and prativadi can cross-review peer-owned chunks in parallel after tests exist.

work_split.scope: Perform independent deep review after implementation, test creation, and cross-review.
work_split.parallel_rationale: Deep review splits across independent review angles when subagent tooling is available.

work_split.scope: Remove stale wording, fuzzy instructions, duplicated guidance, and low-quality residue before final approval.
work_split.parallel_rationale: Deslop can split style, protocol consistency, and artifact integrity checks when paths do not overlap.

subagent_tracks.rationale: Initial run scaffold; record concrete subagent tracks as each phase begins.

verification_matrix.expected: Independent research review confirms the artifact is source-backed and sufficient for spec drafting.
100% test coverage for newly created behavior, or a documented non-executable coverage rationale for source-only docs.

summary: Initial v2 run-scoped baton seed. The vadi skill fills run_id, original_ask, and research_ref. Later implementation phases use parallel_implementing, test_creation, cross_review, cross_fixing, deep_review, and deslop.
next_action: vadi: run research_drafting, write research_ref, then hand off to prativadi for research_review.
